nasb.text: For You do not delight in sacrifice, otherwise I would give it; You are not pleased with burnt offering.

esv.text: For you will not delight in sacrifice, or I would give it; you will not be pleased with a burnt offering.

cnv.text: 因為你不喜愛祭物； 我就是獻上燔祭，你也不喜悅。

ccb.text: 你不喜欢祭物， 否则我会献上， 你也不喜爱燔祭。

csbs.text: 你所喜悦的不是祭物， 否则我就会献上； 燔祭也不是你所悦纳的。
